title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Onboarding flow persists correctly with working animation and visible Continue button after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes on Organized, Up-to-Date, and Personal screens
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
3. Press the Home button or switch to another app to put Poly Studio Mobile in the background.
5. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile from the app switcher or home screen.
6. Observe the current screen, animation state, and visibility of the Continue button.
7. Repeat steps 2–6 for the "Up-to-Date" onboarding screen.
8. Repeat steps 2–6 for the "Personal" onboarding screen.
expected: The app remains on the same onboarding screen (Organized, Up-to-Date, or Personal) with the animation still playing and the Continue button still visible.
